note: Living log of every contact/profile source tried for Kenyan leaders. 'yield' says what the source actually produces; keep this current as sources are added or die.

sources.yield: 348 current MPs: name, constituency, county, party, elected/nominated, member-page URL
sources.noYield: member pages list NO personal emails (only info@parliament.go.ke)

sources.yield: 67 current Senators: name, county, party, elected/nominated
personal Email + Telephone + social links from each person page's contact box; THE email source for leader-accepted claims
sources.caveats: final yield 53 emails + 53 phones across 415 members; 160 found on Mzalendo but with no contact box; 50 member pages 502 permanently (three passes over an hour); 46 emails + 47 phones imported to contacts with provenance

sources.yield: per-parliament member profiles: name, constituency/county, party, status, term, photo URL, committees; final: 394 members/347 photos (13th), 346/314 (12th), 350/187 (11th)
sources.noYield: ZERO bios — every member page carries the 'verified biography not yet available' note (checked prominent MPs too); no emails/phones; 8th-10th parliament pages 404 (stale sitemap entries)

sources.yield: 384 members (290 constituency MPs + 47 Woman Reps + 47 Senators) with party; 124 have Wikipedia articles yielding 123 bio extracts + 33 photos; cross-validates the parliament.go.ke roster
257-page text PDF of 2022 independent MCA-ward candidates: name, ID, county/constituency/ward codes — useful only for aspirant profiles
sources.noYield: no contacts; candidates, not elected members
has Phone Number / ID columns but values are redacted with asterisks
scanned image PDF, no text layer — would need OCR

sources.url: https://gazettes.africa/gazettes/ke (mirror; Scribd copy is paywalled, iebc.or.ke t5KQ6O4YGp.pdf is the presidential-results notice, not this one)
sources.yield: the authoritative all-counties elected-MCA schedule (name, ward, party) — matches the 1450 MCA rows in the positions table
per-county MCA lists with ward + party; formats vary per county (HTML tables, PDFs)
